headings.usage: Page titles, major section headers. distinct from UI text.

data.usage: Prices, P&L, code snippets, logs, coordinates.

accent.usage: AI 'Thoughts', philosophical quotes, strategic insights (The 'Old Money Tech' twist).

colors.primary: Electric Cyan (#00D4FF) - Represents Active Execution & Live Data
colors.secondary: Hot Magenta (#FF2E93) - Represents AI Insights & Risk Warnings
colors.accent: Electric Purple (#A855F7) - Represents System Intelligence & Learning

visual_enhancers.tracing_beam: Use .gradient-border for active trades. The border should feel like live data flowing.
visual_enhancers.glassmorphism: Use .glass-card for static panels. High blur (24px+), saturated backdrop.
visual_enhancers.grid_lines: Background must have a subtle coordinate grid (opacity 5%) to reinforce 'Precision'.
visual_enhancers.scanlines: Overlay subtle scanlines on the 'Bot Vision' or 'Terminal' sections.
visual_enhancers.noise: Add 3% noise to solid dark backgrounds to prevent banding and add texture.

layout_strategy.spacing: Generous. Use p-6 or p-8 for internal container padding. Gap-4 or Gap-6 for grids.
layout_strategy.bento_grid: Use CSS Grid. Avoid equal-width columns. Mix wide (hero), tall (feed), and square (stat) modules.
layout_strategy.hierarchy: Z-index 10 for AI Assistant. It floats above or commands the view.

approach_a.name: Mission Control
approach_a.concept: A high-density cockpit for the omniscient trader.

areas.name: Global_Header
areas.content: Minimal nav, clock, system status pulse.

areas.name: The_Brain (Hero)
areas.content: Combined view of Chart + Bot Logic Overlay. Not just a chart, but a chart with 'vision cones' showing what the bot sees.

areas.name: Active_Positions
areas.content: List of running trades with live P&L. Use 'Tracing Beam' borders on profitable trades.

areas.name: AI_Copilot
areas.content: Chat interface + Quick Actions. Always visible. The 'Voice' of the system.

approach_a.navigation: Top bar with mega-menu for less used features (Settings, Glossary).

approach_b.name: Trading Day Flow
approach_b.concept: A chronological workflow adapting to the market session.
approach_b.visual_cue: The background gradient shifts subtly based on the selected phase (Dawn colors -> Electric Blue -> Sunset Purple).

layout_structure.centerpiece: The 'Core' - A pulsating orb or node graph representing the Bot's state.
layout_structure.orbitals: Modules float around the center like satellites.
layout_structure.interactions: Clicking a 'satellite' (e.g., Last Trade) expands it into a panel.
layout_structure.ai_integration: The AI speaks from the Center Orb. Text bubbles emerge from the core.

features: Chat stream with distinct bubbles for 'User' and 'Bot'.
Bot messages should use a monospaced font for data and serif for 'insights'.
Quick Action Chips (e.g., 'Analyze Trend', 'Check Risk') at the bottom.

Trade_Card.visuals: Green glow for profit, Red glow for loss. Background opacity pulses with volatility.

media.icons: Use 'lucide-react' for UI, 'phosphor-icons' for specific trading actions.
media.3d_library: Use 'framer-motion' for 2D animations. Avoid heavy 3D unless necessary for Approach C (Core).

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. PRESERVE EXISTING FILES: Do not delete existing logic in components. Wrap them or refactor layout only.
2. USE MOCK DATA: If backend is not connected, use realistic mock data for charts and bot states.
3. IMPLEMENT APPROACH A: This is the most practical MVP. Build the 'Mission Control' layout first.
4. CONSOLIDATE: Move 'Market Scanner', 'Learning Intelligence', and 'Backtesting' into widget containers within the dashboard, rather than separate pages.
5. DATA-TESTID: Ensure every clickable element has a data-testid attribute.
universal_guidelines: Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur).
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: transition: all. This results in breaking transforms.
You MUST NOT center align the app container. This disrupts the human natural reading flow of text.
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations.
NEVER use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖🧠 etc for icons. Use proper SVG icons.
Export components as named exports. Pages as default exports.
